issues.title: Template path + inheritance mismatch
issues.attack: Document uses extends 'base.html' and dashboard/index.html path, but actual templates use common/base.html with HTMX partial pattern.
issues.response: Verified. Existing templates use extends request.htmx|yesno pattern. View renders projects/dashboard.html, not dashboard/index.html.

issues.title: complete/skip hx-post vs modal GET
issues.attack: Document has hx-post for complete/skip buttons, but views use GET=modal render, POST=form submit pattern.
issues.response: Verified at views.py:2784. action_complete GET renders modal, POST processes form. Direct hx-post bypasses required modal input.

issues.title: Wrong URL names + # placeholders
issues.attack: project_edit doesn't exist (correct: project_update). Close/drop use hx-get='#' placeholder.
issues.response: Verified in urls.py. Correct names: project_update, project_close, application_drop.

issues.title: Swap boundary too small
issues.attack: Card-level hx-target + outerHTML doesn't refresh parent state (dashboard counts, application state).
issues.response: Card-level swap removed by modal adoption. Accepted: must define HX-Trigger refresh contract for parent containers. Rebutted: card-level swap itself irrelevant with modal pattern.

issues.title: Missing tab structure in project_detail
issues.attack: Current template has tab_bar + tab_content + tab-navigation.js. Document removes all tabs.
issues.response: Verified. project_detail.html has detail_tab_bar.html, tab-content div. Tab skeleton must be preserved.

issues.title: hired_at state unhandled in application_card
issues.attack: Template branches on dropped_at only. hired_at is also a termination flag.
issues.response: Verified at models.py:308-309. is_active checks both dropped_at and hired_at.

issues.title: N+1 performance misdiagnosis
issues.attack: current_state calls filter().order_by().first() — new queryset. action_item_card traverses action.application.project.client.name.
issues.response: Verified at models.py:312-325. prefetch_related alone won't prevent N+1.

issues.title: Missing reschedule button
issues.response: Verified. action_reschedule URL exists. FINAL-SPEC §5.2 shows 나중에 as core triage action.

issues.title: Navigation not HTMX-compatible
issues.attack: Existing templates use hx-get + hx-target + hx-push-url. Document uses plain <a href>.
issues.response: Verified at project_list.html:13. Existing pattern uses progressive enhancement.

issues.title: #modal-container duplicated
issues.attack: base.html:77 already has modal-container. Document adds another in project_detail.html.
issues.response: Verified. common/base.html has the container. Remove duplicate.

issues.title: Missing empty state for pending actions
issues.attack: Application card filters by pending status with no empty handling.
issues.response: Valid. Should show explicit message when 0 pending actions.
